channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. 2 Mount Everest climbers fall to their deaths as record-holder warns of overcrowding  CBS News
  2. Briton makes record Everest climb by foreigner, two die on mountain  Reuters
  3. British climber sets record with 20th Everest summit  Al Jazeera
  4. Two Climbers Die on Everest; Several Rescues on the Way Down  Explorersweb »
  5. 2 Indian Climbers Die Descending Mount Everest After Summit  NDTV

item.title: View / The US needs Gulf allies for the best Iran endgame - Semafor
item.description:
1. View / The US needs Gulf allies for the best Iran endgame  Semafor
  2. A New Order for the Gulf  Foreign Affairs
  3. The Iran War Is Crippling One of the World’s Wealthiest Nations  The New York Times
  4. Why America Can’t Walk Away from the Gulf Economies  Time Magazine
  5. [May 29] Majlis@Waseda: The Gulf at a Turning Point: The Iran War, Policy Reorientation and Future Development  waseda.jp

item.title: Documents show Queen Elizabeth was eager for ex-Prince Andrew to become trade envoy - Yahoo
item.description:
1. Documents show Queen Elizabeth was eager for ex-Prince Andrew to become trade envoy  Yahoo
  2. Queen Elizabeth Pushed for Ex-Prince Andrew to Get Envoy Position, New Documents Show  The New York Times
  3. Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor preferred to visit 'more sophisticated countries', trade envoy files show  BBC
  4. The Guardian view on the Mountbatten-Windsor papers: they expose the collapse of Britain’s 'good chap' state | Editorial  The Guardian
  5. Ex-Prince Andrew prepped on trade role qualifications after Epstein  NewsNation

item.title: Iran cites 'significant' differences with U.S. as mediators push for cease-fire - Haaretz
item.description:
1. Iran cites 'significant' differences with U.S. as mediators push for cease-fire  Haaretz

  4. No deal in sight if US insists on discussing nuclear issue, Iranian FM spokesperson says - report  The Jerusalem Post
  5. Negotiations continue to end war in Iran  WHIO TV

item.title: In West Bank, Latest Victim of Israeli Settler Violence Shocks in a New Way - The New York Times
item.description:
1. In West Bank, Latest Victim of Israeli Settler Violence Shocks in a New Way  The New York Times
  2. Empathy Toward a Dog but Not Palestinian Kids: Israelis' Selective Compassion  Haaretz
  3. Israeli settler filmed throwing concrete block at cats days after dog beating  Middle East Eye
  4. Settler filmed clubbing dog to death in central West Bank Palestinian village  The Times of Israel
  5. Palestinian-owned dog survives after Israeli settler beating  The New Arab
